sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111151" key="filoze/furos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-ζέφῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving the west wind,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:10:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1708.tlg001:12:195" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.195</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
